sample_reviews.author: James T
sample_reviews.text: DAB Plumbing came out the same day to fix a burst pipe. Professional, tidy, and reasonably priced. Would highly recommend.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M
sample_reviews.text: Really impressed with the service. Fixed our leaking radiator quickly and explained everything clearly. Great value for money.

sample_reviews.author: Kevin R
sample_reviews.text: Solid work on our bathroom installation. Turned up on time and left everything spotless. Will use again.

brand.usp: DAB Plumbing Leeds delivers fast, honest plumbing services across East Leeds with no hidden charges and same-day callouts available for emergencies.
brand.hero_headline: Your Trusted Local Plumber in Leeds
brand.about_paragraph: I'm a fully qualified plumber based in Leeds, serving homeowners and businesses across LS15 and the wider East Leeds area. Whether it's a dripping tap or a full bathroom fit-out, I take pride in delivering reliable, affordable plumbing with minimal fuss. Every job is treated with the same care and attention — no hidden costs, just great workmanship.
